const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|legal|citation|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description));

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"(\"Help America Vote Act\" OR HAVA) (\"private right\" OR \"1983\")",court:["ca1","ca3","ca6","ca7","ca9","ca11"],filed_before:"2026-07-18",order_by:"score desc",num_results:10,fields:["id","caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","snippet"]});
